Week 3 of a COPD care program includes tiles: Social Support (Local Programs and Services), Family Feedback (Input and Improvement), Quality Check-In (Progress Review), Coaching Call 3 (Community Connections Review), and Testimonial Tile (Support Group Success Stories).
Social Support, Family Feedback, Quality Check-In, Coaching Call 3, Testimonial Tile

Week 4 of a COPD care program includes tiles: Testimonial Tile 2 (Success Stories and Responsibility), Community Services Tile (Additional Support Options), Assessment Tile 4 (Future Commitments), Discharge Education Improvement Tile (Feedback and Recommendations), and Coaching Call 4 (Taking Control of Health).
Testimonial Tile 2, Community Services Tile, Assessment Tile 4, Discharge Education Improvement Tile, Coaching Call 4

Additional COPD care program tiles include: Phone Book Tile (Updates and Feedback Analysis), Check-in Tile (Medication Review), Coaching Call (Orientation Review), and Encouragement Tile (Post-Call Follow-Up).
Phone Book Tile, Check-in Tile, Coaching Call, Encouragement Tile

An analogy for COPD: 'Think of your lungs as a car engine - they need oxygen to run properly. With COPD, your engine is struggling to get the oxygen it needs to run efficiently, which can cause it to break down more quickly. By taking care of your lungs and making lifestyle changes, you can give your engine the fuel it needs to keep running smoothly and prevent further damage.'

User plans to send a project title after sending all possible opportunities that project makes. The title is 'Filecoin virtual machine'.

User describes Area No 1: Data DAOs. Data DAOs are DAOs whose mission revolves around preservation, curation, augmentation, and promotion of high-value datasets. The FVM makes it possible to implement ingredients to make Data DAOs a reality.

User describes Area No. 2: Perpetual storage. Many common-good datasets rely on stewarding organizations, creating central point of failure. With Filecoin actors, responsibility can be shared collectively; permissionless code can guarantee continuation and renewal of storage.
